change_summary: Disabled production TRAILING_STOP-only daily partial-reduce actions via shared production_parity policy while preserving non-trailing HIGH_REDUCE rules. Fixed-window replay comparison against the old enabled policy improved EV in 2/3 windows and PnL in 2/3 windows: EV delta sum +0.4028, PnL delta +12837.60, partial reduce executions 16 -> 0.
component: quant/production_parity.py, quant/preflight_validator.py, quant/backtester.py, quant/test_production_parity.py, quant/test_quant.py, docs/production_backtest_parity.md, quant/experiments/exp-20260429-011_trailing_partial_reduce_parity.py, data/experiments/exp-20260429-011/exp-20260429-011_trailing_partial_reduce_parity.json, docs/experiments/tickets, docs/experiments/logs, docs/experiment_registry.json, docs/experiment_log.jsonl
hypothesis: 关闭生产 TRAILING_STOP 触发的 daily partial reduce 可以避免重复削减赢家仓位，并提升固定窗口 expected_value_score。
notes: Artifact contains nested fixed-window before/after metrics under deltas_disabled_vs_enabled because this experiment compares shared-policy variants, not one flat backtest JSON.
